dffc46ee: Whether it's a blog or a documentation site, we all need a page to display article content, and this page is the article page.
60c16e87: The article page template is a `.article.ts` file located in the `.kecare/` directory. The generator will call it when processing each article to generate the article detail page.
9f11a481: In summary, `.article.ts` only requires you to return an object containing `urlPath`, `fsPath`, and `template`. The generator can then correctly invoke the template for page generation. `urlPath` is the access path for the article, `fsPath` is the physical path where the file is generated, and `template` is the template string for the Vue component.
7d1e5d0d: We have invoked the `<ArticleTheme/>` component in the template, so next we should proceed to write the page component.
f9eb6cc2: In Vue, data is used in the form of text interpolation, such as `Article Title: {{ article.title }}`. `article.html` contains the HTML content converted from Markdown, rendered using the `v-html` directive. The specific styling is up to your imagination.
